CEQA CASE MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Continued To Dec-09-24 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Richard T. Drury, Esq. of Lozeau Drury, LLP, Tel. 510.836.4200, appearing for Petitioners and Plaintiffs San Francisco Land Use Coalition and Jonathan Clark;
Andrea Ruiz-Esquide, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, appearing for Respondent and Defendant City and County of San Francisco and it's Board of Supervisors;
Deborah E. Quick, Esq. of Perkins Coie, LLP, for Real Party in Interest and Defendant Gokovacandir, LLC.

CEQA Case Management Conference commences.

The Court and counsel confer re: briefing, etc.

The Court stated that briefing will be completed by November, 21, 2024, and that the hearing date will be set in early 2025.

The matter is continued to December 9, 2024, at 2:00 p.m. in Dept. 301 for a further case management conference.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (301/RCE)
